summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new admin features for Shivdhara Charitable Trust. All 37 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend admin panel testing verified: Admin Login with new credentials (admin@admin.com / admin@123), Gallery Image Upload with drag-drop area, Page Visibility toggles for all 7 pages, Page Content editing with EN/GU fields, Stories and Blog sections with Add buttons.
passed_tests: Admin Login - Successfully logged in with admin@admin.com / admin@123 (User: Harsh Gujarati, Role: admin)
Admin Dashboard - Shows stats for Total Donations (0), Amount Raised (₹0), Unread Messages (1), Success Stories (3)
Gallery Section - Shows 5 albums with Add Album button visible
Gallery Form - New Album form with Title (EN/GU), Category dropdown, Active checkbox
Gallery Image Upload - File upload area with 'Click to upload images' text, supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP (multiple allowed)
File Upload API - POST /api/upload successfully uploads images and returns URL
File Upload API - POST /api/upload/multiple successfully uploads multiple images
File Upload API - Correctly rejects non-image file types (400 error)
File Upload API - Correctly requires authentication (401/403 error without token)
Site Settings - Page Visibility tab is first tab with all 7 pages displayed
Page Visibility - All 7 toggle switches present: Home Page, About Us, Gallery, Success Stories, Blog, Donate, Contact Us
Page Visibility Toggle - Successfully toggled gallery page off/on with toast notifications
Page Visibility API - GET /api/pages/visibility returns all 7 pages with boolean values
Page Visibility API - PUT /api/pages/visibility successfully toggles individual pages
Page Visibility API - PUT /api/pages/visibility/bulk successfully updates all pages
Page Visibility Integration - Toggling Blog page OFF correctly hides it from public navigation
Page Content Section - Shows tabs for Home Page, About Page, Donate Page, Contact Page
Page Content - Each section displays English and Gujarati (ગુજરાતી) fields side by side
Page Content - Edit icons (pencil) visible on each content section
Stories Section - Shows 3 stories with Add Story button, Edit/Delete buttons per story
Blog Section - Shows 3 posts with Add Post button, Edit/View/Delete buttons per post
All existing API tests pass (26 tests from previous iteration)
All new feature tests pass (11 tests for upload and page visibility)
seed_data_creation: Test data created during API tests was cleaned up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Admin login with admin@admin.com / admin@123, 2) File upload API at /api/upload and /api/upload/multiple, 3) Page visibility toggles at /api/pages/visibility with 7 pages (home, about, gallery, stories, blog, donate, contact), 4) Gallery form with local image upload (drag-drop area). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py cover all new APIs.
